# Phase 7 Runtime Implementation Readiness Plan

This planning note mirrors Phase 7.0 documentation. It does not create a GitHub workflow, action, deployment, provider adapter, evidence store, database schema, sandbox executor, runtime executor, background job, timer, or communication path.

## Plan

- Define implementation readiness purpose.
- Define runtime implementation boundaries.
- Define provider-neutral implementation readiness.
- Define implementation gating requirements.
- Define runtime isolation readiness.
- Define implementation readiness blockers and escalation.
- Preserve runtime-disabled truth.
- Defer deterministic runtime isolation certification architecture to Phase 7.1.

## Non-Execution Boundary

No workflow file is created by this planning note. No sandbox execution, runtime execution, provider activation, or communication is enabled.
